title: Phase 0 — minimal viable household
summary: Phase-0 plan: wire one Telegram channel, ship multi-tier skill resolution conventions, and render household memory in Obsidian.
notes: Phase doc — hybrid of goals + acceptance criteria (PRD-shaped) and TDD task tracking with embedded completion reports. Not a classic user-story PRD but the closest taxonomy fit: each task has scope, 'Done when' acceptance criteria, and manual-validation steps. No single architectural decision (not ADR), no API/schema contracts (not SPEC), and richer than narrative DOC.
